findings.title: Missing React/Vite configuration. Stack relies on `frontend/templates/` and `frontend/static/`.
findings.evidence: Missing React/Vite configuration. Stack relies on `frontend/templates/` and `frontend/static/`.
findings.impact: The requested React/Vite audit is inapplicable. Architecture mismatches assumptions.
findings.fix: Update documentation to reflect Jinja2 stack or migrate frontend to React/Vite.

findings.title: `app.config.AppConfig.secret_key` has a hardcoded default `"dawnstar-default-secret-key-change-in-production"`.
findings.impact: Potential security risk if deployed without overriding the secret key in `.env`.
findings.fix: Remove default and require it to be set, or warn heavily on startup if default is used.

findings.title: `CORS` middleware is not configured in `main.py`.
findings.impact: If an external frontend is added, API requests will fail due to CORS. (Currently OK due to same-origin).
findings.fix: Add `CORSMiddleware` if migrating to a decoupled React frontend.

findings.title: No `.github/workflows/` directory or equivalent CI pipelines found.
findings.evidence: No `.github/workflows/` directory or equivalent CI pipelines found.
findings.impact: Tests and linters must be run manually, increasing risk of regressions.
findings.fix: Add a basic GitHub Actions workflow for `pytest`, `ruff`, and `mypy`.

findings.title: Docker healthcheck calls `http://localhost:8000/api/health`. FastAPI defines `@app.get("/api/health")`.
findings.impact: Healthchecks are properly implemented and integrated with Docker.

findings.title: Missing `package.json`, `node_modules/`, or React/Vite code; `frontend/` contains only Jinja2 templates and vanilla JS/C
findings.evidence: Missing `package.json`, `node_modules/`, or React/Vite code; `frontend/` contains only Jinja2 templates and vanilla JS/CSS.
findings.impact: Modern SPA assumptions and Vite build pipelines will fail.
findings.fix: Align development strategy: Either migrate `frontend/` to a separate React/Vite project or update documentation to reflect Jinja2 usage.

findings.title: `config.py` uses hardcoded `secret_key = "dawnstar-default-secret-key-change-in-production"`.
findings.impact: Predictable secret keys can lead to session hijacking or predictable encryption.
findings.fix: Enforce `secret_key` via `.env` without a default, or raise an error if untouched in production.

findings.title: `security.py` derives Fernet key from the local database URL (`config.database_url`).
findings.evidence: `security.py` derives Fernet key from the local database URL (`config.database_url`).
findings.impact: If the DB path is known or standard (`sqlite+aiosqlite:///./dawnstar_data/dawnstar.db`), the encryption key can be derived.
findings.fix: Derive Fernet key using `config.secret_key` and a secure salt instead.

findings.title: No `CORSMiddleware` configured in `main.py`.
findings.impact: If frontend is eventually split to React/Vite on a different origin (e.g., port 5173), API requests will be blocked.
findings.fix: Add `CORSMiddleware` in `main.py` allowing localhost development origins.

findings.title: `.github/workflows/` directory is missing. No GitHub Actions defined.
findings.evidence: `.github/workflows/` directory is missing. No GitHub Actions defined.
findings.impact: No automated linting, testing, or build verification on pull requests.

findings.title: Only 3 test files in `tests/` (`test_api.py`, `test_scanner.py`, `conftest.py`).
findings.impact: Insufficient coverage for core logic (AI features, DB migrations, reader engine).

findings.title: `Dockerfile` uses `HEALTHCHECK` with urllib, but lacks rollback scripts or config examples besides `.env.example`.
findings.evidence: `Dockerfile` uses `HEALTHCHECK` with urllib, but lacks rollback scripts or config examples besides `.env.example`.
findings.impact: Production deployments lack formal rollback notes or infrastructure-as-code deployment scripts.
findings.fix: Draft a deployment runbook and backup/rollback script.
